name: Set of 2 Kitchen Towels Signature Plaid/Navy - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Enhance the functionality of your kitchen with this Set of 2 Kitchen Towels from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This set includes two kitchen towels — one with a navy striped design and another in beige plaid — for timeless charm. Made of 100% cotton, these towels feel soft on the hands and help dry dishes off quickly. Plus, these machine-washable towels have a hanging loop for easy storage.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
